overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious wood-paneled corridor in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), approaching two characters having a conversation, orbiting around them, then moving toward a door at the end of the hallway.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wood-paneled corridor toward two figures standing in the distance

notable_agents.action: two men standing and conversing at the far end of the corridor

entered.detail: black shelving unit with glass bottles and stacked boxes
long black leather bench with diamond tufting pattern
large flatscreen monitor mounted on the wood-paneled wall
dark vertical wood paneling covering the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily down a luxurious, warmly lit corridor with dark wood paneling and patterned carpet. A beverage station and black leather bench are visible on the right side, while two figures stand in the distance at the corridor's end.

agents.ego_description: approaching the two standing men while moving past the bench and vending area

notable_agents.action: cybernetic bodyguard in black suit with facial implants standing at attention
corporate executive in suit with blue scarf facing the bodyguard

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward, passing the refreshment station and approaching two characters standing in the corridor. One is a tall bodyguard with visible cybernetic jaw implants, the other a corporate executive in a suit with a blue scarf.

events.description: camera stops linear forward movement and begins orbiting clockwise around the two standing characters

agents.ego_description: circling around the two men, observing their conversation from different angles as they turn to face the camera

notable_agents.action: cybernetic bodyguard turning to track the camera movement while holding a pistol
executive turning to face the camera during the orbit

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits around the two characters, who turn to face it during the conversation. The bodyguard reveals a pistol in his hand and cybernetic implants on his face. The wood-paneled walls surround the scene as the camera moves in a circular path.

events.description: camera completes orbit and resumes forward movement toward the wooden door

agents.ego_description: moving past the two men and approaching the wooden door at the corridor's end

notable_agents.action: bodyguard watching as the camera moves past toward the door

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal frame and small hexagonal viewing window

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the two characters and approaches a heavy wooden door with a small window at the end of the corridor. The bodyguard remains visible to the left as the camera focuses on the door details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression through a luxurious, warmly lit corridor that leads from a quiet interior space toward a focused encounter between two figures. It begins by gliding past dark wood paneling and a patterned carpet, moving alongside a beverage station and a black leather bench on the right. As the camera advances, the distant silhouettes at the end of the hallway gradually resolve into clear forms. The scene then closes the gap to reveal a tall bodyguard with cybernetic jaw implants standing beside a corporate executive wearing a suit and a blue scarf.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that orbits a tense confrontation before gliding toward a closed exit at the end of a luxurious hallway. It begins by circling two characters amidst rich wood-paneled walls, capturing the bodyguard's cybernetic facial implants and the pistol held in his hand as the pair turn to face the lens. As the circular motion concludes, the camera shifts its trajectory to move past the figures and advance down the corridor. The scene then focuses on a heavy wooden door with a small window, leaving the bodyguard visible to the left as the perspective closes in on the door's intricate details.
